cards.afterText: You may place The Doctor and The TARDIS in any available adjacent spaces.
cards.title: Its just a phonebox

cards.afterText: If you were defeated in this combat, you may regenerate without dealing 1 damage to The TARDIS.
cards.duringText: You may increase the value of the opponent’s card by 1.
cards.title: Something else up my sleeve

cards.basicText:
The TARDIS may recover 1 health. If it does, the opposing player can choose one of the following effects:
 - Their fighter recovers 2 health.
 - All of their fighter's attacks in their next turn are +1 value.
cards.title: minor maintenance

cards.afterText: You may move draw 1 card. Or, you may deal 1 damage to The TARDIS and put any card from your hand on top of your deck.
cards.title: Allons-y

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, you may put the card you used to BOOST on the top of your deck.
cards.duringText: You may BLIND BOOST this card.
cards.title: Trust me...Im the doctor.

cards.afterText: You may discard a random card to deal 3 damage to each fighter in this combat.
cards.title: The man who lives on a cloud

cards.duringText: If you are adjacent to The TARDIS, the value of this card is 5 instead.
cards.title: gERONIMO!!!!!!!

cards.afterText: The opposing player may place Dr. Who in any space. If that space is not adjacent to the Tardis, they must discard 1 card.
cards.title: no plan? this is the plan!

cards.duringText: Both players discard the top card of their deck. Add both BOOST values to this card’s value.
cards.title: Lets sing together shall we?

cards.immediateText: Return your opponent's defense card to their hand. Look at their hand and choose a defense or versatile card for them to play. (It may be the same card.)
cards.title: He who won the time war

cards.afterText: If you were defeated in this combat, choose any 2 cards in your discard pile and shuffle them into your deck.
cards.title: Where I stand is where I fall

cards.immediateText: You may cancel all effects on the opponents card or ignore the value of their card.
cards.title: Sonic screwdriver

cards.basicText: If The TARDIS would receive damage at any time, you may discard this card to prevent that damage. If a card was used by the opponent to deal this damage, return the card to their hand. Then, place The TARDIS in any space.
cards.title: We could just rewind that...

hero.name: The Doctor
hero.specialAbility: If The Doctor would be defeated before The TARDIS is destroyed, instead set The Doctor's health to 3 and place him in a space adjacent to The TARDIS.Then deal 1 damage to The TARDIS. The TARDIS can only be damaged by effects.

ruleCards.content:
You do not lose the game when The Doctor is defeated unlesss the TARDIS is defeated.

If there are no available spaces adjacent to the TARDIS when the Doctor is defeated, you may move one fighter adjacent to the TARDIS up to 1 space. Then, place The Doctor in the now vacant space.
If you cannot place The Doctor, you immediately lose the game.
ruleCards.title: Regeneration
